hands.caption: Press evenly through hands
hands.notes: Use near palms or finger mound area.

wrists.caption: Soften pressure in wrists
wrists.notes: Keep cue close to the front edge of the mat.

shoulders.caption: Relax shoulders away from ears
shoulders.notes: Use upper shoulder heads, not the neck.

spine.caption: Lengthen spine
spine.notes: Stretch the glow along the back line.

hips.caption: Lift hips up and back
hips.notes: Place highlight at the top hinge point.

hamstrings.caption: Wake up the backs of the legs
hamstrings.notes: Use a longer glow sweep down the upper back leg line.

knees.caption: Soften knees
knees.notes: Keep the cue gentle and non-corrective in tone.

calves.caption: Lengthen through calves
calves.notes: Use for stretching cues toward the heels.

heels.caption: Reach heels down
heels.notes: Place highlight near heel contact area.

neck_jaw.caption: Relax neck and jaw
neck_jaw.notes: Use breath pulse nearby for softer release moments.
